title: The Great Library of Springtown
content: The Great Library stands at the center of Springtown, its crystal spire visible from every corner of the town. Built by the first settlers as part of their pact with the valley spirits, it contains books that dream themselves into existence. Yuki, the eternal librarian, has guarded it for centuries. The library's collection includes histories of worlds that may never exist and prophecies of events that have not yet occurred. Visitors report that books seem to fly off shelves into their hands, as if the library itself chooses what knowledge to share.
